name: video-shorts-pipeline
description: Turn Google Meet recordings into edited, captioned short-form videos using Grok, Whisper, ffmpeg, and Remotion

scripts.render:all: remotion render PromoVideo-60s-16x9 out/promo-60s-16x9.mp4 && remotion render PromoVideo-60s-1x1 out/promo-60s-1x1.mp4 && remotion render PromoVideo-60s-9x16 out/promo-60s-9x16.mp4 && remotion render PromoVideo-30s-16x9 out/promo-30s-16x9.mp4 && remotion render PromoVideo-30s-1x1 out/promo-30s-1x1.mp4 && remotion render PromoVideo-30s-9x16 out/promo-30s-9x16.mp4 && remotion render PromoVideo-15s-16x9 out/promo-15s-16x9.mp4 && remotion render PromoVideo-15s-1x1 out/promo-15s-1x1.mp4 && remotion render PromoVideo-15s-9x16 out/promo-15s-9x16.mp4
